name: ContractWorks Contract Management API
what_it_does: ContractWorks simple contract management REST API for SMB contract storage, tracking, and renewal management. Enables AI agents to manage contract document storage and organized repository access for centralized contract management, handle contract metadata extraction and tagging for searchable contract intelligence, access key date and obligation tracking for renewal and deadline monitoring, retrieve contract search and filtering for rapid contract discovery, manage user access and permission controls for contract governance, handle contract sharing and collaboration for legal workflow coordination, access contract analytics and reporting for contract portfolio intelligence, retrieve contract template and standard clause management for consistent drafting, manage e-signature workflow integration for contract execution, and integrate ContractWorks with Salesforce, HubSpot, and business systems.
use_cases: Storing contracts from document management agents
Tracking renewal dates from obligation monitoring agents
Searching contracts from legal discovery agents
Managing e-signatures from contract execution agents
not_for: Complex CLM with multi-party negotiation workflows (use Ironclad)
Enterprise contract analytics and AI at scale (use Evisort)
High-volume legal operations with complex approval chains
best_when: An SMB or mid-market company legal or operations team wanting AI agents to automate contract storage, key date tracking, renewal alerts, and basic contract search without the complexity of enterprise CLM platforms.
avoid_when: AUTO-RENEWAL NOTIFICATION RELIABILITY: Automated contract renewal notification must be tested for reliable delivery; ContractWorks renewal alert automation failure creates risk of unwanted multi-year auto-renewal for contracts with auto-renewal clauses. CONTRACT METADATA ACCURACY: Automated metadata extraction from uploaded contracts must be validated against source documents; automated tagging errors create missed obligations and incorrect contract expiration tracking. Confidential contract access controls — automated agent with broad ContractWorks repository access can expose confidential contract terms and pricing to unauthorized users; implement tag-based or folder-based access control before automated querying. E-signature integration dependency — automated contract execution via ContractWorks e-signature integration has dependency on DocuSign or Adobe Sign; e-signature provider outage creates automated contract execution failure.

auth.notes: ContractWorks uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, California HQ. Founded 2012. Private (Litera acquired 2022). Part of Litera legal technology platform. Simple, easy-to-use SMB CLM. DocuSign and Adobe Sign e-signature integration. Competes with Concord, Contractbook, and PandaDoc for SMB contract management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-user monthly subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly/annual subscription; user-based tiers with contract volume
pricing.notes: San Francisco CA. Litera (acquired 2022). Founded 2012. SMB CLM focus. DocuSign/Adobe Sign integration. Per-user monthly subscription. Simple CLM positioning.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — RENEWAL ALERT POLLING REQUIRED: ContractWorks lacks webhook support; automated renewal notification requires polling contract key dates; implement scheduled polling with advance notification lead time (30/60/90 days) aligned with renewal notice window in each contract

Litera acquisition API continuity — ContractWorks was acquired by Litera in 2022; verify current API investment and product roadmap under Litera ownership; consolidation with other Litera products may affect API architecture

Metadata extraction accuracy validation — automated metadata extraction from uploaded contracts must be validated against source document; incorrect expiration date extraction creates missed renewal and auto-renewal liability

Folder-level access control for confidentiality — automated contract access must use ContractWorks folder and tag-based access controls; broad API access without folder scope exposes confidential contracts and pricing to unauthorized automated processes

E-signature provider dependency — automated contract execution via ContractWorks requires DocuSign or Adobe Sign integration; e-signature provider outage or credential expiration causes automated contract execution failure with no fallback in ContractWorks
Document version control — automated contract document upload creates new version; automated workflows must track active version and not operate on superseded contract documents
agent_readiness.security_notes: SMB contract management. SOC2. API key. US. Contract terms and key date data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Contract management. SOC2. API key. US. Contract document and metadata.
